Context-Aware Image Descriptions for Web Accessibility
Our system provides context-aware descriptions for images by considering the image along with extrac
Our system provides context-aware descriptions for images by considering the image along with extrac

Abstract

Blind and low vision (BLV) internet users access images on the web via text descriptions.
Blind and low vision (BLV) internet users access images on the web via text descriptions. New vision

System

When a user clicks on an image in a website (right), our extension adds both long and short versions
